what_was_done: Session 643: Fixed toolshed mid-session crash (ShutdownGuardMiddleware, commit 15e5272). Switched memory embedding from local nomic (768-dim, 151s/embed, 3.3GB) to NVIDIA nv-embed-v1 via NIM API (4096-dim, ~1s/embed, 436MB, MTEB 69.3). Removed vector_256 from schemas. Backup at ~/data/memory/lancedb_nomic_backup/.
